pcs.name: Valenns Vogelsang
pcs.features:
GNOMISH CUNNING: Advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.
SPEAK WITH ANIMALS: Can cast Speak with Animals at will without expending a spell slot (Forest Gnome).
ARCANE RECOVERY (1/Long Rest): Once per day during a short rest, recover one 1st-level spell slot.
MAGIC INITIATE — DRUID (Origin Feat): Guidance and Mending cantrips. Entangle is always prepared and uses Intelligence for spellcasting.
pcs.magic:
Spellcasting: Intelligence | Save DC: 13 | Attack Bonus: +5
Cantrips: Minor Illusion (racial), Guidance (Magic Initiate), Mending (Magic Initiate), Mold Earth, Message, Prestidigitation
Level 1 Spells (Prepared): Entangle (always, Magic Initiate), Shield, Sleep, Grease, Find Familiar (ritual)

resources.name: Arcane Recovery
resources.desc: Recover one 1st-level spell slot during a short rest

inventory.name: The Verdant Staff (Arcane Focus)
inventory.notes: Quarterstaff. 1d6 bludgeoning, versatile (1d8). Also serves as arcane focus.

inventory.name: Spellbook (Bark-bound)
inventory.notes: Contains: Shield, Sleep, Grease, Find Familiar, Detect Magic, Comprehend Languages

inventory.name: Scholar's Pack
inventory.notes: Backpack, book of lore, ink, pen, 10 sheets parchment, little bag of sand, small knife

pcs.name: Slasher
pcs.features:
DRACONIC ANCESTRY (Black): Resistance to acid damage.
BREATH WEAPON (Action, 1/Short Rest): 5x30 ft line of acid. DC 12 DEX save, 2d6 acid damage (half on success).
FIGHTING STYLE — GREAT WEAPON FIGHTING: When rolling a 1 or 2 on a damage die for a two-handed weapon attack, reroll the die and use the new roll.
SECOND WIND (Bonus Action, 1/Short Rest): Regain 1d10+1 HP.
HONEST ARTISAN: Straightforward demeanor. Hones physical strength for smithing mastery.

inventory.name: Explorer's Pack
inventory.notes: Backpack, bedroll, mess kit, tinderbox, 10 torches, 10 days rations, waterskin, 50ft rope

pcs.name: Aria Windchime
pcs.skills: Persuasion +5, Insight +3, Perception +3, Performance +5, Stealth +5, Nature +2
pcs.features:
FEY ANCESTRY: Advantage on saving throws against being charmed. Immune to magical sleep.
BARDIC INSPIRATION (Bonus Action, 3/Long Rest): Give an ally within 60 ft a 1d6 inspiration die. They can add it to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw within 10 minutes.
PACIFIST KINSHIP: Old friend of Valenns sharing his nature outlook. Favors non-violent and espionage-supporting magic.
pcs.magic:
Spellcasting: Charisma | Save DC: 13 | Attack Bonus: +5
Cantrips: Vicious Mockery (1d4 psychic + disadvantage on next attack, WIS save), Friends
Level 1 Spells Known: Longstrider, Healing Word, Bane, Silent Image

resources.name: Bardic Inspiration
resources.desc: d6 to ally's roll. Becomes short rest at Bard 5.

inventory.name: Entertainer's Pack
inventory.notes: Backpack, bedroll, 2 costumes, 5 candles, 5 days rations, waterskin, disguise kit
